title: Incorrect method names in documentation example
problem: The documentation uses non-existent method names getSponsorPubKey() and getSponsorTmpPubKey(). The actual method names in KeyAgreementResult are getPublicKey() and getTmpPublicKey(). Code copied from this documentation will fail to compile.

title: Missing validation in HybridSignature.setL()
problem: The setL() method does not validate that the input value is non-negative or consistent with sigM.length. Similar methods in ECCCipher.setL() and HybridCipher.setL1() perform this validation to prevent invalid state.
